title: tephrosia papuana
intro: Tephrosia papuana, also known as the Papua tephrosia or Papua siris, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia papuana can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
